case_title: GARY PRITCHETT VS. MICHAEL ELLIOT et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRITCHETT, GARY AS TO DEFENDANT ELLIOT, MICHAEL AN INDIVIDUAL KANG, YUN TAEK AN INDIVIDUAL DBA GOLDEN TRIANGLE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
